claim: Future LLM improvements will likely focus on reasoning quality and long-context understanding rather than parameter scaling alone
actionable: When planning LLM adoption, prioritize models with strong reasoning capabilities; test on complex logic and multi-step problems

claim: Extended context windows (100K+ tokens) enable RAG-free document analysis and reduce dependency on external retrieval systems
actionable: For document-heavy tasks, consider using models with extended context; consolidate multiple retrieval calls into single long-context prompts
